sentences.arabic: الشُّكْرُ لِلَّهِ تَعَالَى عِبَادَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ يُحِبُّهَا اللَّهُ.
sentences.translation: Zahvalnost Allahu, subhanehu ve teala, velika je ibadet koji Allah voli.
sentences.translationEn: Gratitude to Allah, the Exalted, is a great act of worship that Allah loves.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ لَمْ يَشْكُرِ النَّاسَ لَمْ يَشْكُرِ اللَّهَ» [رَوَاهُ أَبُو دَاوُدَ، وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Ko ne zahvaljuje ljudima, ne zahvaljuje ni Allahu» [Bilježi Ebu Davud, a vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Whoever does not thank people has not thanked Allah' [Narrated by Abu Dawud, authenticated by al-Albani].

sentences.arabic: يُشِيرُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ إِلَى أَنَّ شُكْرَ النَّاسِ عَلَى إِحْسَانِهِمْ جُزْءٌ مِنْ شُكْرِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje da zahvalnost ljudima na njihovom dobročinstvu jeste dio zahvalnosti Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith indicates that thanking people for their kindness is part of thanking Allah.

sentences.arabic: وَالشُّكْرُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ يَكُونُ بِالْقَلْبِ وَاللِّسَانِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Istinska zahvalnost iskazuje se srcem, jezikom i djelom.
sentences.translationEn: True gratitude is expressed through the heart, the tongue, and action.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَشْكُرُ اللَّهَ عَلَى كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ وَيَشْكُرُ النَّاسَ عَلَى كُلِّ مَعْرُوفٍ.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da musliman zahvaljuje Allahu na svakoj blagodati i zahvaljuje ljudima na svakom dobru.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim thanks Allah for every blessing and thanks people for every act of goodness.
